commands.author: ZOOWH

target.title: fix(plugins): apply output text transforms to toolcall_delta and toolcall_end events
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`toolcall_delta` and `toolcall_end` stream events bypass the output text replacement pipeline. When plugin `textTransforms` mask PII tokens (e.g. `"John Smith"` в†’ `"[MASKED]"`), the LLM generates tool calls using masked tokens. Since these event types aren't processed, masked tokens leak into tool arguments and external systems.

## Root Cause

`transformAssistantEventText` handles `text_delta`, `text_end`, `partial`, `message`, and `error` вЂ” but not `toolcall_delta` or `toolcall_end`. The `stream.result()` path also lacked tool-call argument handling.

## Fix

- Add `toolcall_delta` to the delta replacement path
- Add `toolcall_end.toolCall` handling via `transformToolCallText` вЂ” transforms `arguments` recursively, **preserves `name`** (renaming tools breaks routing)
- Add `arguments` transform to `transformContentText` for `stream.result()` / `done.message` tool-call blocks

Closes #97761

## Change Type

- [x] Bug fix

## Scope

- [x] Agents (plugin text transform pipeline)

## Evidence

### Real behavior proof вЂ” DeepSeek V4 Pro + textTransforms

```
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
  #97769 Real Behavior Proof вЂ” DeepSeek V4 Pro + textTransforms
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
  Workspace: proof-workspace/John Smith.txt в†’ "Hello from John Smith!"
  Transform: "John Smith" в†” "[MASKED]"

  [STEP 1] Input transform: "John Smith" в†’ "[MASKED]"
  [STEP 1] Prompt to LLM: Use the read tool to read "[MASKED].txt"...

  [STEP 2] LLM returned tool call:
  [STEP 2]   path: "[MASKED].txt"  в†ђ MASKED (BEFORE fix)

  [STEP 3] toolcall_delta: {"name":"John Smith","path":"John Smith.txt"}  вњ…
  [STEP 3] toolcall_end path: "John Smith.txt"  вњ…
  [STEP 3] result path: "John Smith.txt"  вњ…

  [STEP 4] File read with restored path:
  [STEP 4]   read("John Smith.txt") в†’ "Hello from John Smith!" вњ…

  вњ… ALL 3 PATHS PASS
  Real LLM proof: DeepSeek V4 Pro returned tool_use("[MASKED].txt")
  Output transform restored в†’ "John Smith.txt" в†’ file read succeeds
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
```

End-to-end proof: input transform masks `"John Smith"` в†’ `"[MASKED]"` before the LLM call в†’ DeepSeek V4 Pro generates `tool_use("[MASKED].txt")` в†’ output transform (our fix) restores `"[MASKED]"` в†’ `"John Smith"` in all three paths (delta, end, result) в†’ file read succeeds.

### Test suite (project runner)

```text
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/plugin-text-transforms.test.ts
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  5 passed (5)
   Duration  1.04s
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 9.27s
```

### Formatting & whitespace

```text
$ pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/plugin-text-transforms.ts src/agents/plugin-text-transforms.test.ts
All matched files use the correct format.
$ git diff --check
(clean)
```

## Security Impact

- New permissions? No
- Secrets handling changed? No
- New network calls? No
